ddls:
CREATE TABLE "brands" (
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brand */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Name of the brand */,
  "brand_description" TEXT /* Description of the brand */,
  "website" TEXT /* Brand's official website */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the brand */,
  "established_date" TEXT /* The founding date of the brand */,
  "country_of_origin" TEXT /* The country where the brand was founded */,
  "brand_type" TEXT /* The type of brand (e.g., luxury, fast fashion, sustainable) */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* Links to the brand's social media profiles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_standards" (
  "standard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size standard */,
  "standard_name" TEXT /* Name of the size standard */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the size standard */,
  "description_long" TEXT /* A detailed description of the size standard */,
  "measurement_system" TEXT /* The measurement system used by the size standard (e.g., metric, imperial) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("standard_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_conversions" (
  "conversion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size conversion */,
  "from_standard_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size standard being converted from */,
  "to_standard_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size standard being converted to */,
  "from_size" TEXT /* Size in the from standard */,
  "to_size" TEXT /* Size in the to standard */,
  "conversion_rate" TEXT /* The conversion rate between the two size standards */,
  "conversion_formula" TEXT /* The formula used for the size conversion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conversion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_conversions_to_standard_id FOREIGN KEY ("to_standard_id") REFERENCES size_standards ("standard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_conversions_from_standard_id FOREIGN KEY ("from_standard_id") REFERENCES size_standards ("standard_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size measurement */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* ID of the brand */,
  "standard_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size standard */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size in the given standard */,
  "bust" TEXT /* Bust measurement */,
  "bust_measurement_unit" TEXT /* The unit of measurement for the bust (e.g., cm, inches) */,
  "waist" TEXT /* Waist measurement */,
  "waist_measurement_unit" TEXT /* The unit of measurement for the waist (e.g., cm, inches) */,
  "hip" TEXT /* Hip measurement */,
  "hip_measurement_unit" TEXT /* The unit of measurement for the hip (e.g., cm, inches) */,
  "other_measurements" TEXT /* Other measurements (e.g., sleeve length, inseam) for the size */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_measurements_standard_id FOREIGN KEY ("standard_id") REFERENCES size_standards ("standard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_measurements_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., customer, admin, content manager) */,
  "address" TEXT /* The user's address */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* The user's phone number */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* The user's date of birth */,
  "measurement_preferences" TEXT /* The user's preferred measurement units (e.g., metric, imperial) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user preference */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* ID of the brand */,
  "standard_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size standard */,
  "preferred_size" TEXT /* Preferred size in the given standard */,
  "preferred_category" TEXT /* The user's preferred product category (e.g., dresses, tops) */,
  "preferred_style" TEXT /* The user's preferred style (e.g., classic, trendy) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_standard_id FOREIGN KEY ("standard_id") REFERENCES size_standards ("standard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the product category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product category */,
  "category_description" TEXT /* A detailed description of the product category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the parent category (for subcategories) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* ID of the brand */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product category */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "product_description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the product */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the product image */,
  "product_code" TEXT /* A unique code for the product */,
  "fabric" TEXT /* The fabric used in the product */,
  "color" TEXT /* The color of the product */,
  "size_range" TEXT /* The size range for the product (e.g., XS-XXL) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES product_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_sizes" (
  "product_size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product size */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "standard_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size standard */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size in the given standard */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Stock quantity of the product size */,
  "stock_status" TEXT /* The stock status of the product size (e.g., in stock, out of stock) */,
  "restock_date" TEXT /* The date when the product size will be restocked */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_sizes_standard_id FOREIGN KEY ("standard_id") REFERENCES size_standards ("standard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_sizes_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user placing the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date of the order */,
  "total_amount" TEXT /* Total amount of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* The payment method used for the order (e.g., credit card, PayPal) */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* The shipping address for the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "product_size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product size */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product size ordered */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the product size */,
  "item_status" TEXT /* The status of the order item (e.g., shipped, delivered) */,
  "shipping_date" TEXT /* The date when the order item was shipped */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_size_id") REFERENCES product_sizes ("product_size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating of the product (1-5) */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment about the product */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date of the review */,
  "review_title" TEXT /* The title of the review */,
  "review_rating" INTEGER /* The rating given in the review (1-5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "promotions" (
  "promotion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each promotion */,
  "promotion_name" TEXT /* Name of the promotion */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the promotion */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the promotion */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the promotion */,
  "discount_type" TEXT /* Type of discount (e.g., percentage, fixed amount) */,
  "discount_value" TEXT /* Value of the discount */,
  "promotion_code" TEXT /* A unique code for the promotion */,
  "promotion_type" TEXT /* The type of promotion (e.g., percentage off, fixed amount off) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("promotion_id")
)
